data.title: Netflix Ends AAA Game Development At California Studio
data.description: Netflix closes its AAA game studio, Team Blue, following the departure of key executives and layoffs affecting 35 staff.

data.title: Denny's Shares Fall Following Disappointing Q3 Financial Results: Details
data.description: Denny's reported third-quarter results, with both adjusted earnings per share and sales missing  the street view.

data.title: Puffco Launches All-New Pivot Dab Device: A Compact And Powerful Option For Cannabis Enthusiasts
data.description: Puffco unveils the Pivot, a portable dab device with advanced features for hash enthusiasts on the go.

data.title: Pfizer Earnings Expected To Grow: What to Know Ahead Of Next Week's Release
data.description: Wall Street expects a year-over-year increase in earnings on higher revenues when Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) reports results for the quarter ended September 2024.
